global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on travel offers.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app with special offers.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, rounded rectangle with a light teal background, featuring a couple of circular shapes in a lighter shade.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center with a slightly darker teal background, containing additional shapes.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape in the lower center, colored in a lighter teal.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape positioned slightly above the previous one, also in a lighter teal.

elements.label: Main call to action
elements.description: A prominent text area at the bottom with bold white text stating 'Escape this weekend Hotels flights in one tap'.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A smaller text area below the main CTA, displaying the price '€19.99' in bold white.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: A bold text at the top center reading 'DriftPass' in a large, clear font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting color.
